initial_access_vector: Compromise of a third-party company with over-permissioned federated access to the client's AWS environment
persistence_mechanism: Leveraging the compromised federated user account of the third party
privilege_escalation: None explicit — third party already had over-permissioned access that exceeded intended scope

techniques.evidence_quote: a company working with our client organization was compromised. This third party had over-permissioned access
the federated user account was leveraged by the threat actor in order to move to the other environment
leveraged by the threat actor in order to move to the other environment and start leveraging access
They affected changing the domain name system to redirect the client organization's website and email
changing the domain name system to redirect the client organization's website

attack_chain.evidence_quote: a company working with our client organization was compromised. This third party had over-permissioned access

attack_chain.description: Attacker leveraged the compromised federated user account to access the client's AWS environment with broader permissions than intended.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the federated user account was leveraged by the threat actor in order to move to the other environment and start leveraging access

attack_chain.description: Attacker modified DNS records to redirect the client organization's website and email traffic.
